testCase.name: DashboardClient (flow) - loads and displays care team cards after data loads
DashboardClient (flow) - clicking a care team card navigates to the journal URL
DashboardClient (flow) - shows 'Set up a care team' link for a new user with no teams
DashboardClient (flow) - pending invite from sessionStorage triggers redirect to invite URL
DashboardClient - shows loading state initially
DashboardClient - renders 'Your care teams' heading when user is authenticated
DashboardClient - shows empty state when no teams exist
DashboardClient - shows care team cards when teams exist
BenefitsNavigator — role gating - returns null for caregiver
BenefitsNavigator — role gating - returns null for supporter
BenefitsNavigator — collapsed state - shows "Benefits navigator" button when collapsed
BenefitsNavigator — expanded, no prior screening - shows Start screener button when no prior results
BenefitsNavigator — expanded, no prior screening - shows questions after clicking Start screener
BenefitsNavigator — screener submission - calls screen.mutate when Find matching programs is clicked
BenefitsNavigator — expanded, prior results available - shows matching program from last screening
BenefitsNavigator — expanded, prior results available - shows run screener again option
BurnoutCheckin — role gating - returns null for supporter role
BurnoutCheckin — role gating - returns null for aide role
BurnoutCheckin — coordinator renders - renders with "How are you doing this week?" heading for coordinator
BurnoutCheckin — coordinator renders - renders three range sliders for coordinator
BurnoutCheckin — form submission - calls burnout.checkIn.mutate on submit with correct fields including week_stamp format
BurnoutCheckin — form submission - shows "Saved!" confirmation text after successful mutation
DocumentVault — collapsed state - shows "Document vault" button
DocumentVault — expanded empty state - shows "No documents uploaded yet" when empty
DocumentVault — expanded with documents - shows document display name
DocumentVault — expanded with documents - shows download button for all roles
DocumentVault — expanded with documents - shows delete button for coordinator
DocumentVault — expanded with documents - hides delete button for supporter
DocumentVault — upload form - shows upload form for coordinator
DocumentVault — upload form - hides upload form for supporter
EolPlanner — role gating - returns null for caregiver
EolPlanner — role gating - returns null for supporter
EolPlanner — collapsed state - shows "End-of-life plan" button
EolPlanner — collapsed state - shows coordinator-only badge
EolPlanner — expanded, no plan - shows "Create plan" button when no plan exists
EolPlanner — expanded, no plan - shows edit form after clicking Create plan
EolPlanner — expanded, plan exists - shows healthcare proxy value
EolPlanner — expanded, plan exists - shows resuscitation preference label
EolPlanner — expanded, plan exists - shows "Edit plan" button
EolPlanner — advance directive documents - shows only advance_directive documents
ExpensePanel — collapsed state - shows collapsed "Shared expenses" button
ExpensePanel — collapsed state - does not show form initially
ExpensePanel — expanded empty state - shows "No expenses logged yet" when empty
ExpensePanel — expanded with data - shows expense description
ExpensePanel — expanded with data - shows formatted amount
ExpensePanel — expanded with data - shows delete button for coordinator
ExpensePanel — expanded with data - hides delete button for supporter
ExpensePanel — role gating for form - shows log form for coordinator
ExpensePanel — role gating for form - shows log form for caregiver
ExpensePanel — role gating for form - hides log form for supporter
ExpensePanel — form submission - submits form with correct values
ExpensePanel — 30-day totals - shows 30-day category totals
ExportButton — role gating - returns null for caregiver role
ExportButton — role gating - returns null for supporter role
ExportButton — coordinator render - renders form with expected elements for coordinator
ExportButton — coordinator render - JSON button is aria-pressed=true by default, PDF is aria-pressed=false
ExportButton — coordinator render - clicking PDF flips aria-pressed state
ExportButton — submit behaviour - calls authenticatedFetch with correct body on submit
ExportButton — submit behaviour - includes since as ISO string when date is set
ExportButton — submit behaviour - shows "Preparing..." and disables button while loading
ExportButton — submit behaviour - shows error alert when response is not ok
JournalClient - shows a loading spinner initially
JournalClient - renders the journal panel by default when no ?panel= param is set
JournalClient - renders the medications panel when ?panel=medications
JournalClient - renders the team panel when ?panel=team
JournalClient - falls back to journal panel for an invalid ?panel= value
JournalClient - hides JournalEntryForm for supporter role and shows read-only notice
JournalClient - shows the top-bar with org name and user email after auth resolves
JournalEntryForm - renders a collapsed textarea with the correct placeholder
JournalEntryForm - expands when the textarea receives focus
JournalEntryForm - expands when text is typed
JournalEntryForm - shows prompt suggestions when expanded and text is empty
JournalEntryForm - hides prompt suggestions once the user types text
JournalEntryForm - shows mood buttons after expansion
JournalEntryForm - selects a mood when clicked
JournalEntryForm - deselects a mood when clicked twice
JournalEntryForm - switches mood when a different mood is clicked
JournalEntryForm - resets all state when Cancel is clicked
JournalEntryForm - submit button is disabled when textarea is empty
JournalEntryForm - submit button is disabled when textarea contains only whitespace
JournalEntryForm - calls onPost with trimmed text and selected mood on submit
JournalEntryForm - calls onPost with empty mood when no mood is selected
JournalEntryForm - resets the form after a successful submit
JournalEntryForm - shows "Sharing..." on the submit button while posting
JournalTimeline — empty state - shows caregiver prompt when canFlag is true
JournalTimeline — empty state - shows supporter message when canFlag is false
JournalTimeline — human journal entries - navigates to detail page when a journal card is clicked
JournalTimeline — human journal entries - renders the entry text
JournalTimeline — human journal entries - renders mood badge when mood is set
JournalTimeline — human journal entries - omits mood badge when mood is absent
JournalTimeline — human journal entries - shows "Flag for doctor" button when canFlag is true
JournalTimeline — human journal entries - hides flag button when canFlag is false
JournalTimeline — human journal entries - shows "Flagged for doctor" badge and Unflag button when entry is flagged
JournalTimeline — human journal entries - calls onFlag with eventId and new flagged value when flag button is clicked
JournalTimeline — human journal entries - renders four reaction buttons
JournalTimeline — system events - renders system events as compact display, not as journal card
JournalTimeline — system events - does not show flag button for system events
MedicationChecklist — null state - returns null (renders nothing) when no schedules
MedicationChecklist — null state - returns null when schedules is undefined
MedicationChecklist — rendered list - shows "Today's medications" header when schedules exist
MedicationChecklist — rendered list - shows medication label: Lisinopril 10mg — 08:00:00
MedicationChecklist — rendered list - both "Gave it" and "Missed" buttons are enabled for coordinator with no logs
MedicationChecklist — disabled states - both buttons are disabled when medication is already logged
MedicationChecklist — disabled states - both buttons are disabled for supporter regardless of log state
MedicationChecklist — mutation - calls logAdministration.mutate with action: "given" when "Gave it" clicked
MedicationPanel — collapsed - renders "Medications" button in collapsed state
MedicationPanel — collapsed - expands when "Medications" button clicked
MedicationPanel — loading and empty - shows "Loading..." when isLoading is true and expanded
MedicationPanel — loading and empty - shows "No medications added yet" when data is empty and expanded
MedicationPanel — medication list - shows medication name, dosage, and "Low supply" badge when supply_days_remaining <= 7
MedicationPanel — medication list - does NOT show "Low supply" badge when supply_days_remaining is 8+
MedicationPanel — coordinator controls - shows "+ Add medication" button for coordinator
MedicationPanel — coordinator controls - does NOT show "+ Add medication" button for supporter
MedicationPanel — coordinator controls - calls deleteMutation.mutate when "Remove" clicked (coordinator only)
OcrReviewPanel — initial state - shows "Scan label" upload button initially
OcrReviewPanel — initial state - shows "No scans pending review" empty state when no jobs
OcrReviewPanel — initial state - shows loading state before data arrives
OcrReviewPanel — review card - renders a pending review card with editable drug_name field
OcrReviewPanel — review card - renders dosage and instructions fields
OcrReviewPanel — confirm and discard - clicking "Confirm" calls authenticatedFetch to /api/ocr/confirm
OcrReviewPanel — confirm and discard - clicking "Discard" calls authenticatedFetch to /api/ocr/discard
OcrReviewPanel — confirm and discard - removes job from list after successful confirm
OuterCirclePanel — collapsed state - shows "Volunteer requests" collapsed button initially
OuterCirclePanel — expanded empty state - expands and shows "No volunteer requests" when list is empty
OuterCirclePanel — request list - shows request title and slot counts when data exists
OuterCirclePanel — request list - calls deactivate.mutate when "Deactivate" button clicked (coordinator)
OuterCirclePanel — coordinator vs supporter - shows "+ New request" button for coordinator
OuterCirclePanel — coordinator vs supporter - renders nothing for supporter role
OuterCirclePanel — coordinator vs supporter - renders nothing for caregiver role
OuterCirclePanel — create form - shows the create form when "+ New request" is clicked
OuterCirclePanel — create form - calls create mutation with form values on submit
OuterCirclePanel — create form - does not call create when title is empty
ShiftForm — collapsed - renders a "+ Schedule a shift" trigger button when collapsed
ShiftForm — collapsed - expands the form when the trigger is clicked
ShiftForm — assignee dropdown - shows caregivers and coordinators in the assignee dropdown
ShiftForm — assignee dropdown - excludes supporters from the assignee dropdown
ShiftForm — submit button - is disabled when no assignee is selected
ShiftForm — submit button - is enabled once assignee and start time are filled
ShiftForm — duration - hides end time input when a fixed duration is selected
ShiftForm — duration - shows end time input when Custom duration is selected
ShiftForm — submission - calls shifts.create with correctly computed start_at and end_at for fixed duration
ShiftForm — submission - collapses the form and calls onSuccess after successful submit
ShiftForm — submission - shows conflict error message when CONFLICT TRPCError is thrown
ShiftForm — submission - shows generic error message for non-CONFLICT errors
ShiftList — empty state - renders "No shifts scheduled" when list is empty
ShiftList — shift cards - renders shift cards with assignee names
ShiftList — shift cards - shows notes when present
ShiftList — Your shift label - shows "Your shift" for current user's shifts
ShiftList — Your shift label - does not show "Your shift" for other user's shifts
ShiftList — cancel button - shows cancel button for coordinator role
ShiftList — cancel button - hides cancel button for caregiver role
ShiftList — cancel button - hides cancel button for cancelled shifts
ShiftList — cancel button - calls shifts.cancel.mutate with correct args when cancel is clicked
ShiftList — week navigation - renders prev and next week buttons
SymptomPanel — collapsed state - shows collapsed "Symptom readings" button initially
SymptomPanel — expanded empty state - expands and shows "No readings recorded yet" for empty data
SymptomPanel — readings list - shows pain level and mood when data exists
SymptomPanel — coordinator vs supporter - shows "+ Log reading" button for coordinator
SymptomPanel — coordinator vs supporter - does not show "+ Log reading" button for supporter
SymptomPanel — log form - shows log form with pain range input and mood pill buttons when "+ Log reading" clicked
SymptomPanel — log form - calls symptoms.log.mutate on form submit with correct values
TeamPanel — member list - shows member display names
TeamPanel — member list - shows role labels
TeamPanel — member list - shows "you" label next to the current user
TeamPanel — member list - does not show "you" label for other members
TeamPanel — member list - shows "No team members yet" when members list is empty
TeamPanel — member list - shows member count in header
TeamPanel — member list - falls back to "?" avatar initial when email is null
TeamPanel — invite button - hides invite button when canInvite is false
TeamPanel — invite button - shows invite button when canInvite is true
TeamPanel — invite button - calls onToggleInvite when invite button is clicked
TeamPanel — invite button - shows "Cancel" label on invite button when form is open
TeamPanel — invite form - shows invite form when showInvite is true
TeamPanel — invite form - disables send button when email is empty
TeamPanel — invite form - calls onInvite with email and role on submit
TeamPanel — invite form - shows "Sending..." while the invite is in flight
TeamPanel — invite form - resets email field after successful invite
EntryDetailClient - redirects to /journal/{recipientId} when event is not in list
EntryDetailClient - renders event text when event is found
EntryDetailClient - shows flag button for coordinator role
EntryDetailClient - does not show flag button for supporter role
SubscriptionsPage - renders page heading
SubscriptionsPage - shows Family Plan name
SubscriptionsPage - shows $14/mo price
SubscriptionsPage - shows cancel subscription option
TeamAdminClient - renders page heading when members load
TeamAdminClient - renders role badge for coordinator member
TeamAdminClient - does not show Remove button for coordinator
POST /api/brief/[shareToken]/revoke - returns 401 when not authenticated
POST /api/brief/[shareToken]/revoke - returns 404 when brief not found
POST /api/brief/[shareToken]/revoke - returns 200 when caller is the brief creator
POST /api/brief/[shareToken]/revoke - returns 200 when caller is a coordinator (not the creator)
POST /api/brief/[shareToken]/revoke - returns 403 when caller is neither creator nor coordinator
POST /api/brief/[shareToken]/revoke - returns 500 when DB update fails
GET /api/brief/[shareToken] - returns 404 when brief not found
GET /api/brief/[shareToken] - returns 410 when brief is expired
GET /api/brief/[shareToken] - returns 200 with brief content on success
GET /api/brief/[shareToken] - does not expose the revoked field in the response
POST /api/brief - returns 401 when user not authenticated
POST /api/brief - returns 400 when org_id is not a UUID
POST /api/brief - returns 400 when recipient_id is not a UUID
POST /api/brief - returns 403 when caller is not a coordinator
POST /api/brief - returns 403 when membership not found
POST /api/brief - returns 404 when care_recipient not found
POST /api/brief - returns 200 with { share_token, id } on success
POST /api/contact - returns 400 when name is missing
POST /api/contact - returns 400 when email is missing
POST /api/contact - returns 400 when message is missing
POST /api/contact - returns 200 on valid submission
GET /api/documents/[documentId]/download — auth - returns 401 when no user
GET /api/documents/[documentId]/download — not found - returns 404 when document does not exist
GET /api/documents/[documentId]/download — role check - returns 404 when user is not an org member
GET /api/documents/[documentId]/download — signed URL - redirects to signed URL when everything is valid
POST /api/documents/upload — auth - returns 401 when no user
POST /api/documents/upload — role check - returns 403 when user is not coordinator
POST /api/documents/upload — validation - returns 400 when displayName is missing
POST /api/export — auth - returns 401 when no user
POST /api/export — validation - returns 400 for missing orgId
POST /api/export — validation - returns 400 for invalid format value
POST /api/export — validation - returns 400 for invalid since (non-ISO)
POST /api/export — validation - returns 400 for missing recipientId
POST /api/export — role - returns 403 when role is caregiver
POST /api/export — role - returns 403 when membership is null (non-member)
POST /api/export — role - returns 403 when coordinator has pending invite (accepted_at is null)
POST /api/export — data fetching - returns 404 when care_recipient not found
POST /api/export — data fetching - returns 404 when identity vault not found
POST /api/export — JSON format - returns 200 application/json with correct top-level keys
POST /api/export — JSON format - includes since in response body when provided
POST /api/export — PDF format - returns 200 with application/pdf content-type
PATCH /api/journal/[eventId]/flag - returns 400 for an invalid eventId
PATCH /api/journal/[eventId]/flag - returns 400 when flagged field is missing
PATCH /api/journal/[eventId]/flag - returns 404 when the event does not exist
PATCH /api/journal/[eventId]/flag - returns 403 when caller has no membership
PATCH /api/journal/[eventId]/flag - returns 403 when caller is a supporter
PATCH /api/journal/[eventId]/flag - returns 200 and flags the entry for a caregiver
PATCH /api/journal/[eventId]/flag - returns 200 and unflagged for a coordinator
PATCH /api/journal/[eventId]/flag - returns 200 for an aide
POST /api/ocr/confirm - returns 401 when not authenticated
POST /api/ocr/confirm - returns 400 when jobId is not a UUID
POST /api/ocr/confirm - returns 403 when caller is not a coordinator
POST /api/ocr/confirm - returns 404 when job not found
POST /api/ocr/confirm - returns 200 { ok: true } on success
POST /api/ocr/discard - returns 401 when not authenticated
POST /api/ocr/discard - returns 400 when jobId missing
POST /api/ocr/discard - returns 403 when caller is not a coordinator
POST /api/ocr/discard - returns 500 when DB update fails
POST /api/ocr/discard - returns 200 { ok: true } on success
GET /api/ocr/review - returns 401 when not authenticated
GET /api/ocr/review - returns 400 when orgId missing from query
GET /api/ocr/review - returns 403 when caller is not a coordinator
GET /api/ocr/review - returns 200 with empty array when no pending reviews
GET /api/ocr/review - returns 200 with jobs array on success
POST /api/ocr/upload - returns 401 when not authenticated
POST /api/ocr/upload - returns 400 when file is missing
POST /api/ocr/upload - returns 400 when orgId is not a valid UUID
POST /api/ocr/upload - returns 403 when caller is not a coordinator
POST /api/ocr/upload - returns 403 when recipient does not belong to org
POST /api/ocr/upload - returns 500 when storage upload fails
POST /api/ocr/upload - returns 200 with jobId on success
POST /api/outer-circle/[shareToken]/claim - returns 400 when name is missing
POST /api/outer-circle/[shareToken]/claim - returns 400 when email is missing
POST /api/outer-circle/[shareToken]/claim - returns 404 when share_token not found
POST /api/outer-circle/[shareToken]/claim - returns 410 when request is inactive
POST /api/outer-circle/[shareToken]/claim - returns 409 when rpc returns slot_unavailable error
POST /api/outer-circle/[shareToken]/claim - returns 200 { claimed: true } on success
POST /api/push/register - returns 400 for invalid platform
POST /api/push/register - returns 400 for missing token
POST /api/push/register - returns 401 when unauthenticated
POST /api/push/register - upserts token and returns 200
POST /api/stripe/checkout - returns 401 without auth
POST /api/stripe/checkout - returns 403 for non-coordinator
POST /api/stripe/checkout - returns 400 if org already on paid plan
POST /api/stripe/checkout - creates Stripe customer if none exists
POST /api/stripe/checkout - reuses existing Stripe customer
POST /api/stripe/checkout - returns checkout URL
POST /api/stripe/checkout - uses monthly price for interval=month
POST /api/stripe/checkout - uses annual price for interval=year
POST /api/stripe/checkout - returns 400 for invalid input (missing orgId)
POST /api/stripe/checkout - returns 400 for invalid input (bad interval)
POST /api/stripe/checkout - returns 404 when org not found
POST /api/stripe/portal - returns 401 without auth
POST /api/stripe/portal - returns 400 for invalid input (missing orgId)
POST /api/stripe/portal - returns 403 for non-coordinator
POST /api/stripe/portal - returns 400 if org has no stripe_id
POST /api/stripe/portal - returns portal URL
GET /api/stripe/verify - returns 401 when user not authenticated
GET /api/stripe/verify - returns 400 when session_id query param is missing
GET /api/stripe/verify - returns 403 when user is not a member of the org in session metadata
GET /api/stripe/verify - returns payment status and interval on success
GET /api/stripe/verify - returns default interval 'month' when metadata.interval is missing
GET /api/stripe/verify - returns 404 when Stripe session not found
POST /api/stripe/webhook - rejects invalid signature
POST /api/stripe/webhook - checkout.session.completed updates org to family plan
POST /api/stripe/webhook - customer.subscription.deleted resets org to free
POST /api/stripe/webhook - invoice.payment_failed returns 200 without DB change
POST /api/stripe/webhook - unknown event returns 200
POST /api/stripe/webhook - checkout.session.completed with no orgId in metadata does nothing
POST /api/stripe/webhook - customer.subscription.deleted when org lookup returns null does nothing
InvitePage - shows invite details when token is valid
InvitePage - calls POST accept when accept button is clicked
InvitePage - shows 'joined the team' after successful acceptance
InvitePage - shows error state for invalid or expired token
OnboardingForm - renders recipient name and org name fields
OnboardingForm - calls authenticatedFetch with correct body on submit
OnboardingForm - redirects to /dashboard on success
OnboardingForm - shows error message on API error response
SignInForm - renders email input and Continue with email button
SignInForm - shows OTP step after submitting email
SignInForm - calls router.replace with /dashboard on valid OTP
SignInForm - shows error message on wrong OTP
SignInForm - button is disabled while submitting email
SignInForm - shows error when supabase returns error on email submit
ErrorBoundary - renders children when no error occurs
ErrorBoundary - renders fallback UI when child throws
ErrorBoundary - does not render the throwing child's content
AppTabBar - renders all tab labels
AppTabBar - marks the active tab with aria-selected based on URL
AppTabBar - calls router.push with correct URL when a tab is clicked
AppTabBar - renders user initials in avatar
ContactForm - renders all form fields
ContactForm - shows success message after submit
HeroSection - renders the main headline
HeroSection - renders primary CTA with correct href
HeroSection - marks floating cards as decorative
MarketingNav - renders Carelog logo text
MarketingNav - renders all nav links
MarketingNav - renders sign in CTA
PricingCards - renders both plan tiers
PricingCards - shows the $14/mo price by default (monthly)
PricingCards - switches to annual price when Annual toggle clicked
PricingCards - marks family plan as most popular
PricingCards - Subscribe button stores pendingPlan in sessionStorage and navigates to /signin
PricingCards - Subscribe with annual interval stores correct interval
PricingCards - Free tier Get started links to /signin
SidebarContext - provides "journal" as default destination
SidebarContext - updates activeDestination when setActiveDestination is called
SidebarNav - renders all 6 nav items
SidebarNav - marks the active destination with aria-current
SidebarNav - calls setActiveDestination when a nav item is clicked
SidebarNav - calls onNavigate prop (no args) when a nav item is clicked
SidebarRail - renders with sidebar-rail testid
SidebarRail - is hidden on mobile and visible on md+
SidebarSheet - renders a trigger button with accessible name "Menu"
SidebarSheet - opens the sheet and shows "Carelog" when the trigger is clicked
RoleBadge - renders coordinator with violet style
RoleBadge - renders caregiver with amber style
RoleBadge - renders supporter with gray style
RoleBadge - renders aide with slate style
acceptInvite state machine - throws "Invalid invite token" when no invite is found
acceptInvite state machine - throws when the token has already been consumed
acceptInvite state machine - throws when the token has expired
acceptInvite state machine - throws when the accepting user email does not match
acceptInvite state machine - accepts when invite email has different casing than accepting user
acceptInvite state machine - resolves and fires both updates on the happy path
benefits.screen — business logic - returns { ok: true } when insert succeeds
benefits.screen — business logic - inserts with created_by: ctx.user.id
benefits.screen — business logic - throws INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR when insert fails
benefits.latest — business logic - returns most recent screening when one exists
benefits.latest — business logic - returns null when no screening exists (PGRST116)
benefits.latest — business logic - throws INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR when DB read fails
burnout.checkIn — logic - upserts a check-in and returns { upserted: true }
burnout.checkIn — logic - uses upsert with onConflict user_id,week_stamp
burnout.checkIn — logic - throws INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR when upsert fails
burnout.myHistory — logic - returns check-ins for the authenticated user
burnout.myHistory — logic - returns empty array when no history exists
burnout.myHistory — logic - throws INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR on query error
burnout.orgSummary — logic - aggregates check-ins by week and returns averages
burnout.orgSummary — logic - suppresses weeks with fewer than 3 check-ins (de-anonymization guard)
burnout.orgSummary — logic - returns empty array when no check-ins exist
burnout.orgSummary — logic - throws INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR when query fails
burnout.checkIn — authorization - throws FORBIDDEN when input.user_id !== ctx.user.id
burnout.checkIn — authorization - succeeds when user_id matches ctx.user.id
burnout.orgSummary — authorization - throws FORBIDDEN for non-coordinator
burnout.orgSummary — authorization - throws FORBIDDEN when membership is null
burnout.orgSummary — authorization - returns aggregated data for coordinator (minimum 3 check-ins per week to prevent de-anonymization)
burnout.myHistory — user isolation - returns only the current user rows (filtered by ctx.user.id)
careEvents.timeline — argument passing - passes recipientId, eventType, limit, and before to getTimeline and returns result
careEvents.timeline — argument passing - passes default limit of 50 when limit is not specified
careEvents.insert — argument passing - calls insertEvent with correct args including actorId from ctx.user.id
careEvents.insert — argument passing - calls insertEventIdempotent (not insertEvent) when idempotencyKey is provided
careEvents.insert — argument passing - throws FORBIDDEN when recipient does not belong to org
careEvents.flagged — argument passing - calls getFlaggedEvents with recipientId and returns result
careEvents.getOne — return value and error handling - returns event data from supabase on success
careEvents.getOne — return value and error handling - throws NOT_FOUND when event does not exist
careEvents.react - calls upsert on journal_reactions with correct args
careEvents.react - throws INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR on supabase error
careEvents.unreact - calls delete with correct event_id and user_id filters
careEvents.reactions - returns correct counts and myReaction when user has reacted
careEvents.reactions - returns null myReaction when user has not reacted
careEvents.reactions - returns empty counts when no reactions exist
careEvents.flag - allows coordinator to flag without throwing
careEvents.flag - throws FORBIDDEN for non-coordinator
careEvents.flag - throws NOT_FOUND for missing event
careEvents.insert — org/recipient consistency check - throws FORBIDDEN when recipient is not found in the specified org
careEvents.insert — org/recipient consistency check - throws FORBIDDEN when supabase returns an error on recipient lookup
careEvents.insert — org/recipient consistency check - does not call insertEvent when recipient check fails
careEvents.insert — org/recipient consistency check - calls insertEvent when recipient belongs to org
careEvents.insert — org/recipient consistency check - queries care_recipients with both recipientId and orgId
careEvents.insert — org/recipient consistency check - calls insertEventIdempotent (not insertEvent) when idempotencyKey is provided
careEvents.getOne — authorization - throws NOT_FOUND when supabase returns an error
careEvents.getOne — authorization - throws NOT_FOUND when event data is null
careEvents.getOne — authorization - returns event data on success
coverageWindows.create — authorization - throws UNAUTHORIZED when no user in context
coverageWindows.create — authorization - throws FORBIDDEN when caller is not a coordinator
coverageWindows.create — authorization - throws FORBIDDEN when coordinator invite not yet accepted
coverageWindows.delete — authorization - throws UNAUTHORIZED when no user in context
coverageWindows.delete — authorization - throws FORBIDDEN when caller is not a coordinator
coverageWindows.list — authentication - throws UNAUTHORIZED when no user in context
documents.list — business logic - returns documents for the given recipient
documents.list — business logic - returns empty array when no documents exist
documents.list — business logic - throws INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR when DB read fails
documents.delete — business logic - deletes storage object before removing DB row
documents.delete — business logic - throws NOT_FOUND when doc fetch returns no data
documents.delete — business logic - throws INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR when DB delete fails
documents.list — authentication - throws UNAUTHORIZED when no user in context
documents.list — authorization - returns documents for any authenticated org member
documents.list — authorization - throws FORBIDDEN when caller is not an org member
documents.list — authorization - supporter role can list documents
documents.delete — authentication - throws UNAUTHORIZED when no user in context
documents.delete — authorization - throws FORBIDDEN when role is caregiver
documents.delete — authorization - throws FORBIDDEN when role is supporter
documents.delete — authorization - throws FORBIDDEN when caller is not an org member
documents.delete — authorization - throws NOT_FOUND when doc does not belong to org
documents.delete — authorization - deletes storage object and DB row when coordinator
eolPlan.get — business logic - returns plan data when it exists
eolPlan.get — business logic - returns null when no plan exists (PGRST116)
eolPlan.get — business logic - throws INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR when DB returns a non-PGRST116 error
eolPlan.upsert — business logic - returns { ok: true } when upsert succeeds
eolPlan.upsert — business logic - sends created_by: ctx.user.id in the upsert payload
eolPlan.upsert — business logic - throws INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR when upsert fails
eolPlan.get — authentication - throws UNAUTHORIZED when no user in context
eolPlan.get — coordinator-only access - throws FORBIDDEN when role is caregiver
eolPlan.get — coordinator-only access - throws FORBIDDEN when role is supporter
eolPlan.get — coordinator-only access - throws FORBIDDEN when caller is not an org member
eolPlan.get — coordinator-only access - returns null when coordinator but no plan exists (PGRST116)
eolPlan.get — coordinator-only access - returns plan data when coordinator and plan exists
eolPlan.upsert — authentication - throws UNAUTHORIZED when no user in context
eolPlan.upsert — coordinator-only access - throws FORBIDDEN when role is caregiver
eolPlan.upsert — coordinator-only access - throws FORBIDDEN when role is supporter
eolPlan.upsert — IDOR prevention - throws FORBIDDEN when recipient_id does not belong to org_id
eolPlan.upsert — IDOR prevention - succeeds when coordinator and recipient belongs to org
expenses.list — business logic - returns expenses for the org/recipient
expenses.list — business logic - returns empty array when no expenses exist
expenses.list — business logic - applies since filter when provided
expenses.list — business logic - throws INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR when DB read fails
expenses.create — business logic - inserts expense with logged_by set to ctx.user.id
expenses.create — business logic - throws INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR when insert fails
expenses.delete — business logic - removes expense by id and org_id, returns ok
expenses.delete — business logic - throws INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR when delete fails
expenses.list — authorization - throws FORBIDDEN when user is not a member (membership returns null)
expenses.list — authorization - returns data when user is a member (any role)
expenses.create — role enforcement - allows coordinator to create
expenses.create — role enforcement - allows caregiver to create
expenses.create — role enforcement - blocks supporter from creating
expenses.delete — role enforcement - allows coordinator to delete
expenses.delete — role enforcement - blocks caregiver from deleting
expenses.delete — role enforcement - blocks non-member from deleting
protectedProcedure — unauthorized - rejects unauthenticated calls to careEvents.timeline
protectedProcedure — unauthorized - rejects unauthenticated calls to memberships.list
careEvents.timeline input validation - rejects a non-uuid recipientId
careEvents.timeline input validation - rejects limit = 0 (below minimum)
careEvents.timeline input validation - rejects limit = 101 (above maximum)
careEvents.flagged input validation - rejects a non-uuid recipientId
memberships.invite input validation - rejects a non-uuid orgId
memberships.invite input validation - rejects an invalid email
memberships.invite input validation - rejects an invalid role
memberships.accept input validation - rejects a token that is too short
memberships.accept input validation - rejects a token that is too long
organizations.get input validation - rejects a non-uuid orgId
organizations.create input validation - rejects empty orgName
organizations.create input validation - rejects orgName over 100 characters
organizations.create input validation - rejects empty recipientName
medications.logAdministration dedup pattern - returns existing event when duplicate within 30-min window
medications.logAdministration dedup pattern - returns null when no duplicate exists
medications.list — logic - returns empty array when no medications exist
medications.list — logic - returns medications filtered by org_id and recipient_id
medications.list — logic - throws INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR on supabase error
medications.create — logic - inserts medication and returns created record
medications.create — logic - sets scan_source to "manual" and active to true
medications.create — logic - throws INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR when insert fails
medications.update — logic - updates medication and returns updated record
medications.update — logic - throws INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR when update fails
medications.delete — logic - soft-deletes medication by setting active=false and returns success
medications.delete — logic - throws INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR when delete fails
medications.logAdministration — logic - inserts a care event with event_type=medication and returns it
medications.logAdministration — logic - returns existing event without inserting when duplicate within 30-min window
medications.logAdministration — logic - throws INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR when care_events insert fails
medications.create — authorization - throws UNAUTHORIZED when no user in context
medications.create — authorization - throws FORBIDDEN when caller is caregiver
medications.create — authorization - throws FORBIDDEN when coordinator invite not yet accepted
medications.update — authorization - throws UNAUTHORIZED when no user in context
medications.update — authorization - throws FORBIDDEN when caller is caregiver
medications.update — authorization - throws FORBIDDEN when coordinator invite not yet accepted
medications.delete — authorization - throws UNAUTHORIZED when no user in context
medications.delete — authorization - throws FORBIDDEN when caller is caregiver
medications.delete — authorization - throws FORBIDDEN when coordinator invite not yet accepted
medications.logAdministration — authorization - throws UNAUTHORIZED when no user in context
medications.logAdministration — authorization - throws FORBIDDEN when caller has supporter role
memberships.invite — coordinator authorization - throws FORBIDDEN when caller has no membership in org
memberships.invite — coordinator authorization - throws FORBIDDEN when caller role is caregiver
memberships.invite — coordinator authorization - throws FORBIDDEN when caller role is supporter
memberships.invite — coordinator authorization - throws FORBIDDEN when caller is coordinator but invite not yet accepted
memberships.invite — coordinator authorization - succeeds and returns inviteUrl when caller is accepted coordinator
memberships.accept — RPC error mapping - throws FORBIDDEN when RPC returns not_found
memberships.accept — RPC error mapping - throws FORBIDDEN when RPC returns email_mismatch
memberships.accept — RPC error mapping - throws CONFLICT when RPC returns already_used
memberships.accept — RPC error mapping - throws INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR on Supabase transport error
memberships.accept — RPC error mapping - returns { success: true } on happy path
memberships.accept — RPC error mapping - calls accept_invite RPC with correct params
organizations.list — authentication - throws UNAUTHORIZED when no user in context
organizations.list — authentication - returns only orgs the user belongs to (delegates to repository)
organizations.get — authentication - throws UNAUTHORIZED when no user in context
organizations.get — authentication - returns org when found (delegates to repository)
outerCircle.create — business logic - returns the inserted row on success
outerCircle.create — business logic - sets created_by: ctx.user.id in the insert payload
outerCircle.create — business logic - throws INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR when insert fails
outerCircle.list — business logic - returns active requests via ctx.supabase
outerCircle.list — business logic - returns empty array when no requests exist
outerCircle.list — business logic - throws INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR when ctx.supabase read fails
outerCircle.deactivate — business logic - returns the updated row with active: false
outerCircle.deactivate — business logic - throws INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR when update fails
outerCircle.create — authorization - throws UNAUTHORIZED when no user in context
outerCircle.create — authorization - throws FORBIDDEN when caller is caregiver
outerCircle.create — authorization - throws FORBIDDEN when coordinator invite not yet accepted
outerCircle.deactivate — authorization - throws UNAUTHORIZED when no user in context
outerCircle.deactivate — authorization - throws FORBIDDEN when caller is caregiver
outerCircle.list — authorization - throws UNAUTHORIZED when no user in context
outerCircle.list — authorization - returns data for authenticated user
shifts.list — logic - returns empty array when no shifts exist
shifts.list — logic - returns shifts within date range
shifts.list — logic - throws INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR on supabase error
shifts.create (single) — logic - creates a single shift with status=scheduled
shifts.create (single) — logic - throws CONFLICT when assignee has overlapping shift
shifts.create (single) — logic - throws INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR when insert fails
shifts.create (recurring) — logic - bulk-inserts N shifts for a recurring series
shifts.update — logic - updates shift status and returns updated record
shifts.update — logic - throws INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR when update fails
shifts.cancel — authorization - throws UNAUTHORIZED when no user in context
shifts.cancel — authorization - throws FORBIDDEN when caller has no membership
shifts.cancel — authorization - throws FORBIDDEN when caller is caregiver
shifts.cancel — authorization - throws FORBIDDEN when caller is supporter
shifts.cancel — authorization - throws FORBIDDEN when coordinator invite not yet accepted
shifts.create — authorization - throws UNAUTHORIZED when no user in context
shifts.create — authorization - throws FORBIDDEN when caller is not a coordinator
shifts.update — authorization - throws UNAUTHORIZED when no user in context
shifts.update — authorization - throws FORBIDDEN when caller is supporter
symptoms.list — business logic - returns readings for the given recipient in descending order
symptoms.list — business logic - returns empty array when no readings exist
symptoms.list — business logic - throws INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR when DB read fails
symptoms.log — business logic - inserts a reading with logged_by set to ctx.user.id
symptoms.log — business logic - returns ok without inserting when duplicate within 30-min window
symptoms.log — business logic - throws INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR when insert fails
symptoms.list — any org member can read - returns data for any authenticated org member
symptoms.list — any org member can read - throws FORBIDDEN when caller is not an org member
symptoms.log — authorization - throws FORBIDDEN when role is supporter
symptoms.log — authorization - succeeds when role is coordinator
symptoms.log — authorization - succeeds when role is caregiver
